2e:["$","div",null,{"className":"flex flex-row gap-2 items-center border-b pt-2 pb-6","children":[["$","$L32",null,{"markdownUrl":"/features/sql-server.md"}],["$","$L33",null,{"markdownUrl":"/features/sql-server.md","githubUrl":"https://github.com/rustfs/docs.rustfs.com/blob/main/content/features/sql-server/index.md"}]]}]
2f:["$","$L34",null,{"children":[["$","p",null,{"children":"Leverage the power of RustFS to run SQL Server 2022 on any cloud (public, private, or edge) using external table functions and PolyBase."}],"\n",["$","$L35",null,{"as":"h2","id":"any-to-any-all-the-time","children":"Any to Any, All the Time"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Use SQL Server 2022 data cloud to query and analyze multiple data sources residing on RustFS. Now enterprises can query data residing on RustFS from any SQL Server instance (in public cloud, private cloud, or even streaming edge instances)."}],"\n",["$","$L35",null,{"as":"h3","id":"supported-deployment-environments","children":"Supported Deployment Environments"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"RustFS integration with SQL Server 2022 supports the following deployment environments:"}],"\n",["$","ul",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"AWS"}],": Amazon Web Services cloud environment"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"GCP"}],": Google Cloud Platform"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Azure"}],": Microsoft Azure cloud platform"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Tanzu"}],": VMware Tanzu container platform"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"OpenShift"}],": Red Hat OpenShift container platform"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"HPE Ezmeral"}],": HPE's container platform"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"SUSE Rancher"}],": SUSE's Kubernetes management platform"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Traditional Bare Metal Deployment"}],": On-premises data center environments"]}],"\n"]}],"\n",["$","$L35",null,{"as":"h3","id":"unified-data-access","children":"Unified Data Access"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Through RustFS's unified S3-compatible interface, SQL Server 2022 can:"}],"\n",["$","ul",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"Access data across multiple cloud environments"}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"Eliminate data silos"}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"Provide consistent query experience"}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"Reduce data integration complexity"}],"\n"]}],"\n",["$","$L35",null,{"as":"h2","id":"connect-to-data-dont-move-it","children":"Connect to Data, Don't Move It"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Using external tables, enterprises can enjoy the full functionality of SQL Server without incurring the cost or coordination challenges of moving data."}],"\n",["$","$L35",null,{"as":"h3","id":"polybase-feature-advantages","children":"PolyBase Feature Advantages"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"PolyBase functionality allows users to query
